LanguageData.VWE_InertialCore.label: inertial core
LanguageData.VWE_InertialCore.description: This weapon maintains absolute kinetic energy during overcharge, ensuring each consecutively pierced target takes the exact same amount of damage without falloff.
LanguageData.VWE_BypassRelay.label: bypass relay
LanguageData.VWE_BypassRelay.description: This weapon features an optimized charging sequence that halves the aiming time normally required to fire in high-power mode.
LanguageData.VWE_OverdrawnCoils.label: overdrawn coils
LanguageData.VWE_OverdrawnCoils.description: This weapon draws excessive power from its reserves during high-power mode, taking slightly longer to charge but delivering vastly increased damage.
LanguageData.VWE_IonizedSabot.label: ionized sabot
LanguageData.VWE_IonizedSabot.description: This weapon magnetizes its projectiles with volatile energy, increasing damage across all firing modes.
LanguageData.VWE_Hypercapacitors.label: hypercapacitors
LanguageData.VWE_Hypercapacitors.description: This weapon is fitted with advanced energy banks that double the possible burst count for all shots, though the resulting rapid-fire sequence no longer guarantees armor penetration.
LanguageData.VWE_InvertedRailTuning.label: inverted rail tuning
LanguageData.VWE_InvertedRailTuning.description: This weapon is radically tuned to deliver devastating low-power shots at close range while reserving its high-power mode for sweeping but less lethal long-range engagements.
